title: Datapacks Screen
description: A mod that adds a datapack selection screen and a .mcfunction autoreload feature.
body:
## Datapacks Screen mod
A simple mod that adds a hotkey to open datapacks selection screen that allows you to toggle and reorder datapacks. The mod only works on integrated servers (singleplayer or lan) where the player is host.

Also you can toggle auto-reload for enabled datapacks. This feature automatically reloads all chanded .mcfunction files and function tags in selected datapacks.

![](https://i.imgur.com/6DmsX7O.png)

## TODO
Add autoreloading for other datapack elements:
- advancements
- recipes
- non function tags
- predicates
- loot tables
